top_signals.title: Oil Declines After Trump Says He Called Off Strike on Iran
top_signals.summary: Oil fell after President Donald Trump said he’d called off a strike on Iran planned for Tuesday following an appeal by Persian Gulf allies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CNBC's The China Connection newsletter: Three major shifts from the Trump-Xi meeting
top_signals.summary: The U.S. and Chinese readouts agree on one phrase: constructive strategic stability.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
